title: strings Command in CTF: Hidden Data Guide
summary: My First (Wrong) Approach — And Why I Chose It When I opened evidence.pcap in Wireshark, my gut reaction was to look at DNS traffic. I found a few packets with short string payloads and tried to read them as ASCII flags. This gives you an instant breakdown of what protocols are present in the capture without requiring you to guess.

title: Stop hardcoding API keys in your AI agents — how I built a governance layer in 3 weeks
summary: Three weeks ago I got tired of pasting API keys into .env files every time I spun up a new AI agent. Secrets managers like Vault and 1Password store secrets well but don't model agents , approvals , or agent-initiated tool requests . Every agent starts with zero access .

title: A Cross-OS Port Finder in Rust — One CLI, Three Completely Different Data Formats
